| **Query Raised** | Under Assessment / Rejected | Portal response or expiry | Each query message attributed and timestamped. |
| **Investigation** | Approved / Rejected / Closed | Special investigation path | 90-day cap tracked visibly. |
| **Approved** | Part Paid / Paid / Closed | Payout instruction triggered | Approved amount, payee, and advice artifact must be preserved. |
| **Paid** | Closed | Settlement completed | Payment proof and communication event required. |
| **Rejected** | Closed | Decision finalized | Reject basis and appeal/grievance path visible. |

**35.3 Endorsement Case States**

| State | Next state(s) | Transition trigger | Guard / note |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Draft** | Pending Approval / Submitted / Cancelled | Maker action | Editable until submitted. |
| **Pending Approval** | Submitted / Rejected / Cancelled | Approver action | SoD guard applies. |
| **Submitted** | Under Review / Query Raised / Rejected | Workflow routing | Effective date and docs checked. |
| **Under Review** | Approved / Query Raised / Rejected | Insurer or rules review | Before/after compare view mandatory for material changes. |
| **Approved** | Applied / Failed | PAS command accepted | Application may still fail technically; workflow must distinguish business approval from technical completion. |
| **Applied** | Completed | Authoritative change persisted | Artifacts and notifications triggered. |
| **Query Raised** | Under Review / Cancelled | Maker/MPH response | Visible due dates and thread history required. |

**35.4 Renewal Case States**

| State | Next state(s) | Transition trigger | Guard / note |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Upcoming** | Open | Window opens | Renewal task and notice generated. |
| **Open** | Census In Progress / Closed | User enters renewal flow | Open until census work begins or insurer cancels. |
| **Census In Progress** | Census Locked / Query Raised | File submission / member cleanup | Split-lane validation supported for bulk. |
| **Census Locked** | Quote Pending / Re-opened | Ready for pricing | No material data edits without unlock or new version. |
| **Quote Pending** | Quote Received / Query Raised | Pricing underway | Expiry and commercial assumptions tracked. |
| **Quote Received** | Under Approval / Rejected / Repriced | Review completed | Versioning mandatory. |
| **Under Approval** | Accepted / Rejected | Approver decision | Step-up auth required. |
| **Accepted** | Issued / Failed | Issuance handoff | Contract acceptance evidence retained. |
| **Issued** | Closed | Renewal completed | New policy/endorsement refs linked. |

**35.5 Bulk File / Job States**

| State | Next state(s) | Transition trigger | Guard / note |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Received** | Parsed / Failed | Upload accepted | File hash, source, uploader, and template version stored. |
| **Parsed** | Validated / Failed | Structural read succeeds | Sheet/template errors surfaced quickly. |
| **Validated** | Partially Accepted / Ready For Apply / Rejected | Business rules complete | Reason-coded row outputs generated. |
| **Partially Accepted** | Applying / Repair Pending | Valid rows proceed; bad rows isolated | Critical split-lane behavior. |
| **Applying** | Applied / Failed | Authoritative writes underway | Idempotent downstream command dispatch. |
| **Repair Pending** | Reprocessed / Expired Unresolved / Closed With Extensions | Corrected file or manual review | Follow-up batches linked without duplicating already-applied rows. |
| **Applied** | Closed | All valid outcomes persisted | Operational and financial extracts reconcile. |

**36\. Configuration Packs, Validation Registry, and Runtime Artifacts**

To prevent logic from leaking into scattered application code, the implementation should stand up a versioned configuration registry on day one. The portal can remain product-line aware without turning into a hard-coded GTL-only app.

| Artifact family | Owned by | Versioning rule | Used at runtime for |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Role and scope matrix** | Product \+ security | Effective-dated, environment promoted | RBAC, SoD, policy/scheme visibility, masking rules |
| **Screen contract pack** | Product \+ frontend | Per module and product line | Field visibility, labels, mandatory/conditional logic, widget type, tab enablement |
| **Validation rule catalog** | Business \+ engineering | Versioned by policy/scheme/product pack | Field and business validation codes such as VR-DATE-LWD, VR-NOM-01, VR-GST-01 |
| **Reason code registry** | Product \+ ops | Stable immutable codes | User-facing errors, reports, audit, insurer queries, bulk annotated files |
| **Document checklist catalog** | Claims/ops product owner | Claim-type and product-line versioned | Dynamic required-doc rendering and query rules |
| **Endorsement type registry** | Operations product owner | Product-line aware | Allowed endorsement types, required fields, approval thresholds, downstream commands |
| **Renewal workflow pack** | Renewal product owner | Per line of business and scheme class | Window rules, census requirements, quote acceptance rules, repricing triggers |
| **Notification template catalog** | CCM/ops | Channel \+ locale \+ event versioned | Emails, SMS, in-app alerts, acknowledgements, reminders |
| **Integration command catalog** | Platform/integration | Schema-versioned | Downstream PAS, claims, document, payout, and analytics handoffs |
| **Localization pack** | Product \+ design \+ ops | Per locale | Labels, date/currency formatting, document templates, scheme-specific notices |
| **Report definition catalog** | Reporting owner | Permissioned and versioned | Standard report filters, columns, aggregations, scheduling |

**37\. Engineering Work Packages, Team Topology, and Sprint Sequence**

**37.1 Recommended Team Topology**

• Squad A \- Portal Shell and IAM: login, MFA, invitation, session, nav shell, policy context, design system, BFF foundations.

• Squad B \- Member and Endorsement Servicing: roster, member detail, add/update/remove, nominee, endorsement workflow, bulk member operations.

• Squad C \- Claims and Renewals: claim intake/tracker, claim docs/query loop, renewal calendar, census, quote review, acceptance.

• Squad D \- Platform and Shared Services: document facade, notification service, audit/eventing, configuration registry, reporting, observability, CI/CD, contract testing.

**37.2 Epic Map**

| Epic | Scope | Key dependencies | Exit criteria |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **EPIC-01 Portal shell and IAM** | Org onboarding, login, MFA, scoped navigation, policy switcher, session controls | IdP integration, role matrix | Users can sign in, switch policy context, and see correct module entitlements. |
| **EPIC-02 Policy and dashboard read model** | Portfolio cards, alerts, tasks, policy detail, product tabs | PAS read integration, BFF | Dashboard and policy detail are live with role-aware actions and counts. |
| **EPIC-03 Member roster and detail** | Search/filter, member cards, nominee view, documents, history | Policy/member query service | Users can find, inspect, and export member records with masking and audit. |
| **EPIC-04 Member servicing core** | Add/update/remove via LWD single-record flows \+ approval | Member servicing API, workflow, PAS adapter | Core servicing works end-to-end with audit, approvals, and completion events. |
| **EPIC-05 Claims intake and tracker** | FNOL wizard, document upload, query thread, SLA timeline | Claims core adapter, document service | Claim can be initiated, tracked, and queried without leaving portal. |
| **EPIC-06 Endorsement cockpit** | Case creation, before/after compare, timeline, approvals, completion | Workflow engine, PAS adapter | Material endorsement types supported with correct side effects. |
| **EPIC-07 Renewal servicing** | Calendar, census upload/lock, quote view, acceptance | Renewal/pricing integration, docs | Renewal is fully workable from preparation through acceptance. |
| **EPIC-08 Shared platform controls** | Audit, notifications, reports, config registry, observability | Event bus, object store, telemetry stack | Platform controls exist for all business journeys and support launch-readiness evidence. |

**37.3 Sprint-Ready Sequence (2-week sprints)**

| Sprint | Primary outcome | Hard deliverables |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Sprint 0** | Foundations and contract freeze | OpenAPI/AsyncAPI skeletons, CI/CD, environments, auth integration approach, reason-code starter set, decision log closure. |
| **Sprint 1** | Portal shell \+ auth | Login/MFA/invitations, navigation shell, policy context switch, basic dashboard scaffolding. |
| **Sprint 2** | Policy detail \+ roster read paths | Policy list/detail, member search/detail, audit read, document list foundations. |
| **Sprint 3** | Add member \+ update member | End-to-end member create/update workflows with approvals, validation, PAS callback handling. |
| **Sprint 4** | Remove member via LWD \+ notifications | LWD wizard, cease-date computation path, open-claim warnings, notification history, completion events. |
| **Sprint 5** | Claims intake | FNOL wizard, dynamic checklist, document upload, claim detail timeline, query thread MVP. |
| **Sprint 6** | Endorsement cockpit MVP | Create endorsement, compare view, approval actioning, applied/completed status loop. |
| **Sprint 7** | Renewal MVP | Renewal list/detail, census upload/parse, lock flow, quote review scaffolding. |
| **Sprint 8** | Stabilization \+ operational readiness | Performance tuning, security fixes, audit evidence exports, UAT fixes, runbooks, launch checklist. |

**37.4 Definition of Ready / Definition of Done**

• Definition of Ready: approved PRD section, UI flow, API contract draft, event contract draft if async, reason codes, sample payloads, test scenarios, and dependent system owner identified.

• Definition of Done: code merged, unit/integration tests green, contract tests green, audit entries verified, analytics events emitted, masking verified, accessibility pass completed, and operational runbook updated.

**38\. Test Strategy, Release Gating, and Go-Live Readiness**

**38.1 Test Layers**

| Test layer | What it proves | Minimum focus areas |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Unit and service tests** | Pure business logic is stable | Validation rules, state guards, reason-code mapping, idempotency decisions, date computations, masking helpers. |
| **API contract tests** | Front-end and backend stay aligned | OpenAPI schemas, error models, auth headers, optimistic concurrency, approval flows. |
| **Consumer-driven event tests** | Async integrations remain compatible | Event envelope, version tolerance, replay safety, DLQ handling. |
| **End-to-end workflow tests** | Real user journeys succeed across services | Add member, LWD exit, claim FNOL, claim query response, renewal acceptance, sensitive download. |
| **Performance tests** | Operational traffic is sustainable | Roster search, dashboard load, bulk parse throughput, concurrent approval actions, export jobs. |
| **Security and privacy tests** | Controls work in reality | RBAC/SoD, masking, upload scanning, audit immutability, session handling, step-up auth, insecure direct object reference checks. |
| **UAT and ops simulation** | Business is ready to operate | Claims timers, exception handling, annotated error files, support workflows, evidence exports, rollback rehearsal. |

**38.2 Critical Release-Gate Scenarios**

• A maker cannot approve their own member-add, endorsement, or renewal acceptance request even if they manipulate the UI.

• A duplicate claim submit for the same member, claim type, and event date is blocked with a link to the existing case.

• A future-dated LWD moves the member to Pending Exit and does not physically delete history or active coverage prematurely.

• A bulk file with 1,000 rows and 50 bad rows applies the 950 valid rows, produces a downloadable annotated error file, and does not duplicate applied rows on rerun.

• Claim SLA clocks continue to display correctly after insurer query, document re-upload, approval, and payment events.

• Sensitive downloads generate audit evidence and role-based masking/reveal logic works across UI and export surfaces.

**38.3 Launch Readiness Checklist**

| Readiness area | Must be true before go-live |
| ----- | ----- |
| **Contracts** | OpenAPI and AsyncAPI definitions versioned, signed off, and implemented; backward compatibility policy documented. |
| **Operations** | Runbooks for failed batches, stuck workflows, DLQ replay, notification failures, document generation failures, and incident escalation published. |
| **Security** | Pen test closed, secrets handling validated, MFA enforced, step-up auth working, audit immutability verified. |
| **Business readiness** | Training complete for MPH admins and insurer ops; SOPs published for queries, rejections, and exception handling. |
| **Supportability** | Dashboards, alerts, and correlation-ID tracing live across all core services. |
| **Data retention** | Retention/purge/archive policies configured and signed off by legal/compliance. |
| **Roll-back / roll-forward** | Safe disablement and recovery plan documented for major workflows and integrations. |

**39\. Immediate Decisions Required Before Sprint 1**

| Decision | Proposed default | Owner |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Single app shell vs separate member self-service app** | Separate sponsor-admin and member-facing front ends on shared back-end contracts; admin app first. | Product \+ architecture |
| **Workflow engine selection** | Use central orchestration/workflow engine; keep business rules/config in versioned packs. | Engineering leadership |
| **Auth model** | Enterprise login \+ MFA for MPH admin roles; later optional OTP-based member/annuitant access. | Security \+ product |
| **Bulk upload in release scope** | Include bulk member and renewal census uploads from early release because they are operationally core. | Business \+ product |
| **Notification channels** | Email \+ in-app mandatory; SMS optional; WhatsApp only if compliance/commercial approvals exist. | Operations \+ compliance |
| **Step-up auth requirement** | Mandatory for approvals, renewal acceptance, bank/payee changes, and sensitive downloads. | Security |
| **Document storage approach** | Object store \+ DMS indexing \+ immutable document metadata in portal domain. | Platform |
| **Audit evidence export format** | CSV \+ JSON evidence bundle with document references and correlation IDs. | Audit/compliance |
| **Quote acceptance signature model** | MFA-backed digital acceptance first; external eSign as optional later enhancement. | Legal \+ product |
| **Broker visibility** | Out of phase-1 build except restricted read-only renewal tracker if explicitly funded. | Business |

**40\. Implementation Starter Pack for Day-1 Execution**

The team should not start coding from the PRD alone. The following companion artifacts should be created immediately and tracked as first-class deliverables alongside code:

| Artifact | Format / location | Purpose |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **OpenAPI contracts** | /contracts/openapi/\*.yaml | Stable synchronous API definitions for front-end, backend, QA, and partner teams. |
| **AsyncAPI / event schemas** | /contracts/asyncapi/\*.yaml or schema registry | Event envelopes, payload versions, and consumer responsibilities. |
| **Reason-code registry** | /config/reason-codes/\*.yaml | Single source for UI, audit, reports, and support diagnosis. |
| **Validation packs** | /config/validation/\*.yaml | Field and business rule configuration per product line/scheme. |
| **Screen contract pack** | /ui/contracts/\*.json | Field visibility/editability/mandatory logic for configurable screens. |
| **Workflow state models** | /workflow/state-machines/\*.yaml | Allowed transitions, guards, timers, and compensations. |
| **Sample payload fixtures** | /test/fixtures/\*.json | Golden request/response/event samples for test automation and mock environments. |
| **Operational runbooks** | /ops/runbooks/\*.md | Failure recovery, support steps, escalation paths, DLQ replay, and incident routines. |
| **UAT scenario pack** | /test/uat/\*.xlsx or .md | Business-readable walkthroughs and sign-off evidence. |
| **Decision log** | /docs/architecture/decision-log.md | Tracks open questions and architectural decisions so scope drift stays controlled. |

With these additions, the PRD is no longer only a requirements document. It becomes the execution baseline for architecture, contract design, implementation planning, testing, and launch readiness.

# **39\. v3.1 Exhaustiveness Addendum: MPH, Partner, TPA, Member and Insurer Operations Coverage**

*This section is part of the main PRD baseline. It expands the existing v3.0 portal into a role-aware group ecosystem portal rather than a narrow MPH/member servicing portal.*

## **39.1 Source Interpretation and Design Correction**

The whiteboard input changes the product boundary. The portal should not be treated only as a Master Policyholder and optional member self-service surface. It must support a controlled operating model across four external stakeholder families \- MPH, partners/intermediaries, TPAs/service partners, and members/annuitants \- plus insurer operations. The portal remains one policy-aware shell, but every workspace must expose different data, actions, wallet views, MIS views, document controls, approval rules, and query/track experiences.

| Input theme | PRD impact | Design decision |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| MPH buy journey | Adds pre-issuance/proposal acceptance, quote acceptance evidence, policy setup readiness and wet-signature document collection to the portal backlog. | Create an MPH Buy / Setup workspace; do not push all pre-issuance artifacts to email. |
| MPH bulk data upload / census | Strengthens census upload from a renewal-only utility into a recurring joiner/leaver/member-correction channel with validation, repair, approval and downstream PAS posting. | Treat bulk upload as a first-class Bulk Operations service with batch states and reusable templates. |
| MPH corporate document upload | Adds legal entity, signer, KYC, MSME, GST, board authorization, MoA/AoA and mandate evidence handling. | Create a Corporate Documents vault tied to legal entity \+ policy \+ transaction purpose. |
| MPH wallet management | Moves wallet/cash deposit from read-only billing visibility into operational ledger management, top-up tracking, holds, transfers, reversals and BG tracking. | Create Wallet / Cash Deposit module with immutable ledger and maker-checker for financial actions. |
| Partner data upload and business MIS | Adds broker/channel/intermediary upload, portfolio views, sales/MIS dashboards, commission/earning visibility and limited servicing intimation. | Create Partner Workspace with masking, commission controls and client-scope governance. |
| Partner earning / loan data | Adds producer commission/earning view for intermediaries and borrower/loan exposure view for lender/channel partners. | Expose only configured commercial or loan views; never expose member-sensitive fields by default. |
| Partner servicing / endorsement request intimation and tracking | Adds partner-assisted service request initiation and status tracking without allowing unauthorized final changes. | Partner can intimate/track; insurer/MPH authorization still governs final execution. |
| Member individual data change | Adds member self-service for personal data corrections, nominee/bank changes and document uploads subject to scheme permission. | Member changes become controlled service requests, not direct PAS writes. |
| Member wallet management | Adds member-level premium/contribution/fund/payout visibility where product line permits. | Member wallet is a read/track surface unless a specific payment or mandate flow is enabled. |
| TPA/service partner requirement | Adds TPA-specific claim/service document handling, evidence deficiency queues, hospital/medical document coordination and claim/support MIS. | TPA workspace must be scoped by assignment; no commercial, payroll or unrestricted portfolio visibility. |

## **39.2 Revised Stakeholder Capability Matrix**

| Stakeholder workspace | Primary actor | Core journeys | Data visible | Actions allowed | Hard restrictions |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| MPH Workspace | Employer HR, payroll, finance, trustee, lender ops, authorized signatory | Buy/setup journey, bulk census, member add/update/remove, corporate document upload, wallet/CD management, renewal, claims intimation, MIS, service requests | Full policy and member data in assigned scope; sensitive fields masked by role | Create/approve workflows, upload docs, accept quotes/renewals, manage users, initiate financial entries | Maker cannot approve own transaction; high-risk edits require step-up MFA and audit |
| Broker / Intermediary / Channel Workspace | Broker servicing team, channel manager, relationship manager, lender/channel admin | Data upload, business MIS, earnings/commission view, loan/borrower exposure view, servicing/endorsement intimation and tracking | Only assigned policies or portfolios; commercial fields only when permitted | Upload partner files, view status, raise service requests, respond to insurer queries, download allowed MIS | No unrestricted member KYC, medical docs, payroll, bank or wallet transfer access unless explicitly configured |
| TPA / Service Partner Workspace | TPA claims/service coordinator, medical document desk, service provider operations | Claim support, document deficiency, service task tracking, evidence upload, query response, SLA/MIS | Assigned claims/tasks only; selected member and policy context needed to complete the task | Upload/replace documents, respond to queries, update task status, provide service remarks | No access to premium, commission, full roster export, wallet transfer, quote acceptance or employer-wide data |
| Member / Annuitant Workspace | Insured member, borrower, annuitant, pensioner, nominee/claimant where allowed | Coverage view, individual data change, nominee/bank update, document upload/view, service request/track, member wallet/fund/payout view | Self-only data; nominee/claimant data only when relationship is verified | Raise requests, upload documents, view certificates/statements, track claims/services | No employer roster, broker commission, employer wallet, policy-level financials or other member data |
| Insurer Operations Workspace | Servicing, claims, underwriting, finance, compliance, relationship manager | Review, approve, query, reject, complete PAS/claims/core integration, reconcile wallet, monitor SLA, audit | Role-scoped operational view across assigned portfolios | Override with reason, raise query, complete workflow, reconcile exceptions, export audit evidence | Privileged actions require SoD, reason codes and immutable audit |

## **39.3 Revised Navigation Architecture**

| Navigation module | MPH | Partner / Broker / Channel | TPA / Service Partner | Member / Annuitant | Insurer Ops |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Home / Workbench | Portfolio KPIs, tasks, wallet alerts, renewal alerts | Portfolio/MIS, open requests, earnings alerts | Assigned task queue, document deficiencies, SLA alerts | My coverage, pending requests, documents | Operations queue and SLA dashboard |
| Buy / Setup Journey | Quote/proposal acceptance, setup checklist, corporate docs | View deal/setup status if allowed | No | No | Setup validation, document review, issuance handoff |
| Policies | Policy and scheme detail, benefits, rates, schedules | Policy status and non-sensitive summary | Task-linked policy summary | Self coverage summary only | Full operational policy view |
| Bulk Data / Census | Upload census/joiners/leavers/corrections; validate/repair/approve | Upload assigned partner/customer data where configured | No roster upload unless assigned to task | No | Monitor, reject/accept, apply to PAS |
| Corporate / Transaction Documents | Upload/view entity docs, signer docs, proposal/quote/renewal docs | Upload partner files and permitted documents | Claim/service docs only | Self docs and claim docs only | Review, verify, query, archive |
| Members | Roster and member detail in scope | Masked roster or exposure list only if permitted | Claim/task-linked member details only | Self profile only | Full role-scoped roster |
| Servicing / Endorsements | Create/approve/track changes | Intimate/track service and endorsement requests | Respond on assigned service/claim tasks | Raise self-service request | Review/query/complete |
| Claims | Initiate/track sponsor-assisted claims | Track claims where assigned/allowed | Evidence handling and query response | Raise/track claim where allowed | Claim operations workbench |
| Wallet / Cash Deposit / Accounting | CD wallet, top-up, receipts, transfers, BG, ledger, holds/reversals | Earnings/commission view or loan exposure wallet only if allowed | No financial wallet except task payment status if configured | Member contribution/fund/payout wallet only where applicable | Finance reconciliation and exceptions |
| MIS / Analytics | Operational, membership, claims, billing, renewal MIS | Business MIS, partner performance, earnings/loan data | SLA and task completion MIS | Self statements only | Portfolio, compliance, SLA, leakage analytics |

## **39.4 Detailed Journey Additions**

### **39.4.1 MPH Buy / Setup Journey**

| Step | Screen / component | Mandatory fields / artifacts | Validation / control | Output |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Quote / proposal acceptance landing | Quote reference, product, scheme, premium, validity, accepted terms, authorized signatory | Quote must be valid and not superseded; approver must be configured signatory | Acceptance case created |
| 2 | Corporate KYC and entity document checklist | PAN, GST, CIN/LLPIN if applicable, MoA/AoA or trust deed, board resolution, authorized signatory proof, KYC of signatory, MSME undertaking where applicable | Entity document rules vary by organization type; wet-signature / original requirement flagged | Corporate document pack versioned |
| 3 | Bank and remittance setup | Bank account holder name, account number, re-enter account number, IFSC, bank name/branch, account type, cancelled cheque, mandate / NEFT form, UTR reference if paid | Penny-drop/name-match where integrated; bank proof mandatory for payouts/refunds; masking applied | Bank profile and remittance reference captured |
| 4 | Census / initial member data | Template version, member ID, name, DOB, gender, DOJ/disbursement date, sum assured, plan, nominee if applicable | Structural \+ business validation; duplicates and age/SA limits; partial acceptance | Validated census version |
| 5 | Final declaration and submission | Declaration, accuracy confirmation, signer, digital/wet signature evidence, timestamp | Maker-checker, MFA, SoD; missing wet-signed docs create pre-issuance blockers | Setup submitted to insurer/PAS |
| 6 | Issuance / portal activation tracker | PAS status, policy number, certificate generation status, pending queries | Portal waits for authoritative issuance / setup completion event | Policy active for servicing |

### **39.4.2 Bulk Data Upload / Census Operations**

| Requirement ID | Requirement |
| :---- | :---- |
| FR-BULK-001 | Bulk upload must support multiple business intents: initial census, joiners, leavers/LWD exits, salary/category changes, nominee updates, renewal census, partner data files and loan/borrower exposure files. |
| FR-BULK-002 | Every upload must carry file purpose, policy/scheme context, source actor, template version, row count, hash, idempotency key and data-classification tag. |
| FR-BULK-003 | The validation pipeline must split structural validation, referential validation, business-rule validation, financial impact validation and document/declaration validation. |
| FR-BULK-004 | The portal must allow row-level repair without forcing the user to re-upload the entire file, while preserving the original uploaded file and producing a repaired version audit trail. |
| FR-BULK-005 | Valid rows must not be blocked by invalid rows unless the file has a policy-level fatal error such as wrong policy, wrong template, unauthorized uploader or corrupted file. |
| FR-BULK-006 | A downloadable annotated error file must include row number, field, failed value, reason code, plain-English message, severity, and suggested correction. |
| FR-BULK-007 | Large files must show job status: Received, Parsing, Structure Failed, Validating, Validated, Approval Pending, Applying, Partially Applied, Applied, Repair Pending, Rejected, Cancelled. |
| FR-BULK-008 | Bulk actions above configured thresholds must require maker-checker approval and step-up MFA before application to PAS/core systems. |

### **39.4.3 Partner / Broker / Channel Workspace**

| Journey | Capabilities | Controls |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Data upload | Upload partner-provided customer/member/borrower/renewal files; download template; view validation output; respond to data queries. | Policy/portfolio scope, template versioning, masking, no final application without configured approval. |
| Business MIS view | Lives, policies, premium pipeline, renewals, pending servicing, claim status, persistency/renewal readiness, open exceptions. | No member-sensitive data unless necessary; export watermark and audit. |
| Earnings / commission data | Commission/earning summary, payable/accrued/held amounts, clawback/reversal status, statement download, dispute request. | Commercial data visible only to roles with commission entitlement; cannot be visible to generic servicing users. |
| Loan / borrower data | Loan account number, disbursement date, outstanding loan, sum assured basis, assignment/lender split, borrower coverage status. | Relevant mainly to GCL/lender/channel use cases; borrower PII masked by default. |
| Servicing / endorsement intimation and tracking | Raise request, attach documents, tag member/policy, see status and insurer query, provide response. | Partner can initiate or assist; final approval depends on MPH/insurer authorization and product rules. |

### **39.4.4 TPA / Service Partner Workspace**

| Journey | Capabilities | Controls |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Claim evidence support | View assigned claim/task, upload medical/admin documents, respond to document deficiency, track SLA. | Task-scoped access only; no full policy wallet, earnings or roster export. |
| Medical / service document exchange | Upload hospital documents, discharge summary, investigation papers, disability evidence, service completion proof. | Document type, version, malware scan, source attestation and tamper hash required. |
| Service status update | Update assigned task status such as Received, Under Review, More Info Needed, Completed. | No claim approval/payment decision rights unless insurer explicitly delegates that workflow. |
| TPA MIS | Assigned task volumes, ageing, deficiency categories, turnaround, SLA breach risk. | Aggregated view only; member PII minimized. |

### **39.4.5 Member / Annuitant Workspace**

| Journey | Capabilities | Controls |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Individual data change | Update contact, address, email/mobile, nominee, bank, tax details, and selected demographic corrections where scheme allows. | Change request with effective date, proof document, masking, approval path and before/after audit. |
| Servicing request / track | Raise service request, query, grievance, claim intimation, certificate request, correction request and track status. | Self-only access; sponsor visibility depends on scheme/privacy rules. |
| Member wallet / value view | View contribution, premium allocation, fund value, payout history, annuity/pension payment, refund status or member-specific ledger where product allows. | Read-only unless payment/mandate flow is explicitly enabled; no employer CD transfer access. |
| Document upload \+ view | Upload KYC, bank proof, claim docs, nominee proof, tax forms; view COI, statement, payout advice, claim letters. | Document checklist by journey; virus scan; role-based masking; secure download logs. |

## **39.5 Bank Details, Mandates and Financial Data Requirements**

| Data group | Fields | When required | Validation / control |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| MPH bank profile | Account holder name, account number, re-enter account number, IFSC, bank name, branch, account type, cancelled cheque, PAN/GST linkage, mandate form, authorization letter | Refunds, top-up reconciliation, policy setup, premium remittance, payout routing where MPH is payee | Account number masked; IFSC directory validation; duplicate bank profile check; penny-drop/name match if integrated; maker-checker for create/update. |
| Member/claimant bank profile | Payee name, relationship, account number, IFSC, bank name, account type, cancelled cheque/passbook, NEFT mandate, PAN/Form 15 where applicable | Claims, refunds, annuity/pension payout, member withdrawals, nominee/beneficiary payments | Payee must match nominee/claimant rules; bank update cannot silently change payout beneficiary; step-up auth and insurer review for high-risk changes. |
| Partner commercial bank profile | Broker/channel legal name, payout account, IFSC, GST/PAN, commission statement email, withholding/tax details | Commission/earnings payout and statement generation | Visible only to commercial finance roles; changes need finance approval. |
| Cash deposit receipt data | Mode, amount, UTR/reference, value date, payer bank, receiving insurer bank, receipt image, cheque details or BG details | RTGS/NEFT/cheque/BG receipts and wallet top-ups | Positive amount, reference mandatory, duplicate UTR check, value date not future beyond bank rule, clearance status before usable balance. |
| Bank guarantee data | BG number, issuing bank, amount, validity, beneficiary, upload copy, renewal date, invocation/expiry status | Cash deposit / collateral-backed servicing | Expiry alerts at 60/30/15 days; utilization depends on insurer finance rules; immutable history. |
| Transfer data | Source policy wallet, destination policy wallet, amount, reason, transfer date, approver, ledger references | Policy-to-policy CD transfers | Source and destination different; source available balance sufficient; atomic debit/credit; threshold approval. |

## **39.6 Corporate, Transaction and Wet-Signature Document Model**

| Document category | Examples | Owner / uploader | Mandatory logic | Lifecycle status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Corporate identity | PAN, GST, CIN/LLPIN, incorporation certificate, MoA, AoA, trust deed, society registration | MPH admin / insurer ops | Required for setup/KYC depending on entity type | Not uploaded, Uploaded, Under Review, Accepted, Rejected, Expired, Renewal Required |
| Authorized signer | Board resolution, authority letter, signatory KYC, specimen signature, digital-signing certificate metadata | MPH admin / authorized signatory | Required before quote/proposal/renewal acceptance if signature is needed | Versioned by signer and effective dates |
| Proposal / quote / policy | Proposal form, quote document, acceptance letter, declaration, policy schedule, COI/certificate, endorsement schedule | MPH / insurer / CCM | Quote acceptance cannot complete without required evidence; wet-signed docs may block issuance | Draft, Pending Signature, Signed, Received Original, Verified, Archived |
| Financial / mandate | Cancelled cheque, NEFT mandate, remittance proof, UTR screenshot, BG copy, premium receipt | MPH finance / insurer finance | Mandatory for wallet/payout/refund/receipt workflows by rule | Pending Clearance, Cleared, Rejected, Reconciled |
| Member / claimant | KYC, nominee proof, claim form, death certificate, medical records, police papers, discharge form | MPH, member, claimant, TPA | Dynamic claim/member checklist; avoid repeated piece-meal requests | Deficient, Complete, Verified, Queried, Superseded |
| Partner / TPA | Partner agreement, GST/PAN, commission mandate, TPA authorization, SLA agreement, task evidence | Partner/TPA admin / insurer ops | Required before commercial/TPA workspace activation | Active, Under Review, Expired, Suspended |

## **39.7 Wallet / Cash Deposit / Member Value Model**

| Wallet type | Owner | Purpose | Allowed actions | Ledger events |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Policy cash deposit wallet | MPH / insurer finance | Track premium funding, top-ups, transfers, holds, deductions and balance availability. | View, upload receipt, request transfer, download ledger, view BG and alerts. | receipt.created, receipt.cleared, premium.debited, transfer.debited, transfer.credited, hold.placed, hold.released, reversal.posted |
| Member wallet / value account | Member / annuitant / pensioner | View member-level premium/contribution/fund/payout/refund history where applicable. | View statement, download payout advice, raise discrepancy, update mandate if allowed. | contribution.posted, units.allocated, payout.scheduled, payout.paid, refund.initiated, refund.paid |
| Partner earnings wallet / statement | Broker/channel/intermediary | Track earned, accrued, payable, held, clawed back or reversed earnings/commission. | View/download statement, raise dispute, update commercial bank mandate via approval. | earning.accrued, earning.approved, payout.scheduled, payout.paid, clawback.posted, dispute.raised |
| Loan exposure wallet/view | Lender/channel partner / GCL | Track borrower exposure, disbursement, outstanding balance, cover amount, lender assignment and claim split. | Upload loan data, view exposure, track claim split, download MIS. | loan.uploaded, exposure.updated, outstanding.refreshed, assignment.updated, lender.claim\_split.confirmed |

## **39.8 Functional Requirement Additions**

| ID | Requirement |
| :---- | :---- |
| FR-STK-001 | The portal shall support distinct configurable workspaces for MPH, broker/intermediary/channel, TPA/service partner, member/annuitant and insurer operations. |
| FR-STK-002 | The portal shall enforce workspace-specific navigation, action permissions, field masking, download restrictions and audit rules. |
| FR-MPH-BUY-001 | The portal shall support an MPH buy/setup journey covering quote/proposal acceptance, corporate KYC, signer authorization, initial census, bank/remittance setup and issuance tracking. |
| FR-DOC-001 | The portal shall provide a Corporate and Transaction Documents vault with document checklist rules by stakeholder, product, transaction type and legal entity type. |
| FR-DOC-002 | The portal shall capture whether a document requires wet signature, digital signature, original receipt, attestation, expiry review or insurer verification. |
| FR-WALLET-001 | The portal shall provide wallet/cash-deposit management including receipt capture, BG tracking, transfer request, hold/release, reversal visibility and immutable ledger export. |
| FR-PARTNER-001 | The portal shall provide partner data upload, business MIS, earnings/commission view, loan exposure view and servicing/endorsement intimation tracking where configured. |
| FR-TPA-001 | The portal shall provide TPA/service partner task queues for claim/service evidence upload, deficiency response, task status update and SLA MIS. |
| FR-MEMBER-001A | The portal shall allow members/annuitants to raise controlled individual data change requests for contact, address, nominee, bank, tax and document updates where the scheme permits. |
| FR-BANK-001 | The portal shall maintain bank profiles and payout mandates for MPH, member/claimant and partner entities with masking, proof upload, validation, versioning and maker-checker approval. |
| FR-MIS-001 | The portal shall provide stakeholder-specific MIS packs: MPH operational MIS, partner business/earnings MIS, TPA SLA MIS, member self-statements and insurer governance MIS. |

## **39.9 API and Event Contract Additions**

| Contract / event | Producer \-\> consumer | Purpose | Minimum payload |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| POST /setup-cases | Portal BFF \-\> setup workflow | Create MPH buy/setup case. | policy/quote ref, org ref, product, signer, checklist version, idempotency key |
| POST /document-packs/{id}/documents | Portal \-\> document service | Upload corporate/transaction/member/TPA document. | document type, purpose, owner, source actor, file hash, signature/original requirement |
| document.verification.requested | Document service \-\> insurer ops | Route document for verification/query. | documentId, packId, owner, required action, due date |
| document.verified / document.rejected | Insurer ops \-\> portal/tasks | Update document status and unblock/block workflow. | documentId, status, reason code, remarks, verifier |
| POST /wallets/{id}/receipts | Portal \-\> finance service | Capture top-up/remittance receipt. | walletId, mode, amount, value date, reference, payer bank, documentRef |
| wallet.receipt.cleared | Finance service \-\> portal | Make receipt usable in available balance. | receiptId, walletId, cleared amount, clearing date, balance |
| POST /wallet-transfers | Portal \-\> finance workflow | Request policy-to-policy transfer. | source wallet, destination wallet, amount, reason, maker, threshold flag |
| partner.earning.statement.ready | Finance/commission \-\> partner workspace | Expose partner earning statement. | partnerId, period, gross, deductions, net payable, statementRef |
| loan.exposure.uploaded | Partner upload \-\> validation/orchestration | Start GCL loan exposure validation. | batchRef, lender/channel, policy, row count, fileRef, hash |
| member.data\_change.requested | Member workspace \-\> workflow | Submit individual data change request. | memberId, change type, before/after, proof docs, consent, effective date |
| tpa.task.updated | TPA workspace \-\> claims/service core | Update assigned TPA task status and evidence. | taskId, claimRef/serviceRef, status, docs, remarks, actor |

## **39.10 Data Masking and Access Rules by Stakeholder**

| Data domain | MPH | Partner / Broker | TPA | Member | Insurer Ops |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Member roster | Full in assigned policy unless masked by role | Aggregated or masked unless explicitly allowed | Only task-linked member | Self only | Role-scoped full |
| Bank details | Masked; reveal by role and justification | Own commercial bank only; no member bank | No unless claim task requires last-4 view | Own bank masked/reveal through MFA | Role-scoped, audited reveal |
| Medical / claim docs | Claim-linked access where sponsor-assisted | No by default | Assigned task docs only | Own/claimant docs only | Claims role scoped |
| Wallet/CD ledger | Policy wallet in scope | No employer wallet; earnings/loan view only if configured | No | Self value wallet only where applicable | Finance/ops scoped |
| Commission/earnings | No unless MPH is also producer by configuration | Own partner earnings only | No | No | Finance/commercial scoped |
| Corporate KYC docs | Own organization full | Own partner documents only | Own TPA documents only | No | Ops/compliance scoped |
| Downloads | Watermarked and logged | Watermarked and logged | Task-bound and logged | Self documents logged | Audit logged |

## **39.11 Acceptance Criteria and Release Gate Additions**

| Scenario | Acceptance criterion |
| :---- | :---- |
| MPH setup journey | A policy setup cannot be submitted if mandatory corporate, signer, quote/proposal or wet-signature documents are missing. The portal shows the exact blocking document and owner. |
| Bank profile change | A bank account update requires proof upload, maker-checker approval, masking, audit, and cannot silently change payout recipient eligibility. |
| Bulk census upload | A file with valid and invalid rows creates separate accepted/rejected lanes, produces annotated error output and does not duplicate applied rows on rerun. |
| Wallet receipt | A submitted receipt appears as Pending in the ledger immediately and becomes Available only after clearance or authorized finance confirmation. |
| Policy transfer | A transfer posts atomic debit and credit ledger entries; if one side fails, both are rolled back or held as a reconciled exception. |
| Partner earnings | A broker/channel user can view only their own earnings statement and cannot see MPH cash deposit, member bank data or medical documents. |
| TPA task | A TPA can upload evidence only against assigned tasks and cannot open full portfolio/member roster or financial screens. |
| Member data change | A member can submit own data change with proof and track the request, but cannot directly mutate PAS/core records without workflow approval. |
| Document verification | Rejected documents show reason code, remarks, replacement action and complete version history. |
| MIS exports | Every export is scoped, watermarked where needed, and logged with actor, timestamp, filters and purpose. |

## **39.12 Updated Delivery Phasing Impact**

| Phase | Additions required |
| :---- | :---- |
| Phase 1A | Add stakeholder-aware shell, corporate document vault MVP, MPH setup checklist, bank profile capture, core masking framework and policy wallet read model. |
| Phase 1B | Add bulk upload hardening, wallet receipt/transfer workflow, partner service intimation/tracking, member data-change request and enhanced document verification. |
| Phase 1C | Add partner MIS/earnings, loan exposure view, TPA task queue, member wallet/fund/payout views and advanced wallet reconciliation. |
| Phase 2 | Add deeper buy journey orchestration, digital/wet signature tracking, commission dispute workflow, partner analytics, TPA integrations and conversational guided servicing. |
